description_long: This is a compact, rectangular first-aid kit with a robust, hard-shell exterior. The main body is predominantly black with metallic gray panels and features a prominent green cross symbol set within a circular medallion on the front, indicating its medical purpose. The kit is reinforced with green accents, including a sturdy handle on top for easy carrying and transport. The surface shows some wear and scuff marks, suggesting it is designed for rugged, urban environments. The sides are solid and feature no visible openings, while the front and back are nearly identical, both displaying the green cross. The construction appears to be primarily of plastic and metal, with internal space likely dedicated to medical supplies.
description: A rugged, black and gray first-aid kit with a green cross symbol and a sturdy green handle, designed for urban emergency use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green cross medallion, green handle, and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kit's slim profile and solid, uninterrupted black panels.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the green cross and handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim, solid black profile.
